title: Too Young for Love
writer: André Birabeau, Franco Brusati, Lionello De Felice
actors: Marina Vlady, Pierre-Michel Beck, Aldo Fabrizi
plot: Andrea and Annetta are two fifteen year olds from very different families. They love each other and find in their love a refuge from the evils and problems of the world. However, the real troubles begin when the girl becomes pregn...
